title: Sakiyan (language)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Sakiyan''' [[Language/Legends|language]] was the native language of the [[Sakiyan/Legends|Sakiyan]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from [[Sakiya]]. Most Sakiyan were also fluent in either [[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]] or [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], although they were only literate in their own language.

{{Language-stub}}
